name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
description: This fine wooden box contains {@dice 1d4} pots of pigment and a brush (weighing 1 pound in total). Using the brush and expending 1 pot of pigment, you can paint any number of three-dimensional objects and terrain features (such as walls, doors, trees, flowers, weapons, webs, and pits), provided these elements are all confined to a 20-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube}. The effort takes 10 minutes (regardless of the number of elements you create), during which time you must remai
